titleStmt.title: SII 18.79: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 79. (B.K. No. 77 of 1933-34.) SŌMĀPUR, NARGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the front wall of the Basavaṇṇa temple.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Bhuvanaikamalladēva is dated in Śaka [996], Ānanda, Pushya śu. 5, Wednesday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrāṇti, corresponding to A.D. 1074, December 24, Wednesday, f.d.t. ·67.

It states that when Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Mārasimha, the Śilāhāra chief, born in the Jīmūtavāhana lineage was governing [Kūṇḍi] Three-thousand, Miriṁje Three-thousand and other regions, a grant of land for a feeding house and a Jaina basadi, was made in the presence of the Mahājanas of Mekkegēri in Naṛuguṇḍa.
Also a grant made for the feeding house by a certain seṭṭi (name lost) is recorded. The record is very badly damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭā raka satyā
śrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmadbhuvanaikamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarō ttarābhivṛddhipra
varddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . kanda . Adaṭarivarenipa pagevaranadirppi tannājñeyiṁ caturvvā
rddhiparītadhareyanāḷdanatyabhyudaya bhuvanaikamallanartthige nalla . tatpādapadmō pajīvi samadhigatapaṁca
mahāśabdamahāmaṇḍaḷēśvarata garapura varādhīśvara śiḷāhāranarēṁdra jīmūtavāhanā nvayaprasū
ta suvarṇnagaruḍadhvaja maṟuvakkasarppaṁ gūvalana siṁgaṁ ripumaṇḍaḷikabhairavaṁ vidviṣṭa gajakaṇṭhīravaniḍuvarādityaṁ rū
panārāyaṇaṁ maṇḍaḷikamukhadarppaṇaṁ samarasaṁghaṭṭō gharatna diśāpaṭṭa jaḷadhinīra
baḍavānaḷaṁ vairikāḷānaḷaṁ giridurggalaṁghana śanivārasiddi sarasvatīkarṇnāvataṁsaṁvācaka vācaspati vivēkabṛhaspati kavi
vikramāditya rājāvaḷīvirājitarappa śrīmanmahā maṇḍaḷēśvara mā
rasiṁhadēvarkoṁḍi mūsāsiramumaṁ miriṁje mūsāsiramumaṁ padi neṁṭu grāmaṁgaḷumaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadināḷu
ttamire . kanda . rājāvaḷiyaṁ pogaḷdaṁ vyāḷa rmigilugrājiyoḷaṁ mārasiṁganājiyināḻdetta kagoḷvava
nāvaṁ . v® . prakaṭitadharmmanirmmaḷarudāraguṇa vīravikramarssukavigaḷudghacārucarita rmmahi pavitrarājñi
karucitaprasaṁgarabhimānigaḷiṣṭaviśiṣṭadānigaḷsakaḷakaḷāgamajñarati rnnaṟugundada dvijar . Ā naṟugundadō
mahatvadinoppuva mekkegēriya viprarā dhuraṁdhararāśritakalpavṛkṣa rādhānavidhānaradhyayanasāragōṣṭhīvidhānatatpa
rarddhyānarupādhi dṛṣṭapararśśivabhaktarurvvī varddharmmajña titajñar
mekkegēriya dvijarella . vṛtta . ha dāracārucaritarssakaḷakaḷāgamapāragar yaśōdhararaka
ḷaṁka rīśapadābjabhṛṁgarakṣarathikasatya dha rmmadāniga mekkegēriya mahājana
ru puṇyabhājanar . vacana . Ā mūvatta miḻdu pra rvvadiṁ sakavarṣa 996 neya Ānanda saṁvatsarada puṣya
suddha 5 budhavāramuttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti rajavarmma yargge kāruṇyaṁgeydu dhārāpūrvvakadiṁ taleyani
sarvvanamasyaṁ māḍi koṭṭar . doḷāgeṟeymakeymattarppadineṁṭaṟoḷa gā prabhu śatrakke biṭṭa matta
rppanneraḍu Adara teṁkalottida keymattarā rmmāḍida basadige biṭṭaṁ catrakke maneyoṁdumanā mahājanamā
caṁdrārkkatāraṁ rakṣisuvaru . Ā varṇnana . v® . rahita pāraparākramaniṣṭadāni dhā
tri māni puṇyapuruṣa ripuji ṟeyanakaḷaṁka kīrttimanōhara dharmmamūrttika ka liya
mmaseṭṭiya yoḷe . sakaḷa jagatsaṁ kānte kāntāratna muddika
bbeyeṁboḷvesariṁ . v® . Ā daṁpatigaṁ p®yasuta cāritravaṁtanahita [k®]tāṁtaṁ mēdiniyoḷā vinōdaṁ trai va ryyanaca
ḷitadhairyya . Ā gōvaṇaseṭṭiya sati sāsa tadhātriyoḷ śrīge nele bhōgada cāgada malliyabbeyeṁ
boḷvesariṁ . v® . Avara maga t® niṣṭaśiṣṭaviśiṣṭapōṣaṇaṁ prava ra jinēṁdrapadapadmaśiḷīmukhanāptasaṁnmukhaṁ ravisamadī
vitatōjvaḷakīrtti rttivallabha bhuvana tamanudghatācayaṁ vera
śātakīrtti viśṟutanabhimāni satyaparanūrjjita taṁnuta gō traniḷāpavitramāśri
tanajavarmmaseṭṭi jagado dharmmakarmmajaṁ . kaṁ . dharmma parahita neyaṁ permme subaneṁba sadgu
ṇamārmmodalajavarmma ṭṭidavini jinana pūjeya yane kēḷuva
kivi tanagenalajavarmma jagadoḷ . Ātana sati sītegarundatige ratige lakṣmige bhūbhṛjjātege sarasvatige migile
dēcikabbeya naguṇadiṁ jinapūje yiṁdāgamōktiya jinanadhīśabhaktigatiyiṁdajavarmmana kāṁte
kṣiti poga cikabbeyanēka ḍepāpaviśāpamāgade . ka . pettabbe jāyika
bbe ti dharmmārttanajavarmmanenipaṁ piriyaṇaṁ jayadēvanavarajaṁ śrī
rācamalla rmmanenalkurvvareyoḷ peṟardēcikabbeyanārnnōṁtar . Ā dharmmadānada
phaḷamaṁ tandeya vaggadi polliseṭṭiye ne gaḻdaṁ . baḍagalbakuḷageṟeyiṁda
dasade panneraḍu ma mūvattaydaradaṁ paḍe rmma yyaseṭṭi śatrakkittaṁ . śatrada keyyaṁ maneyaṁ citrisi buddhiyi
ne meṟedu kiḍisu dhātri narakakkiḷiguṁ . svada ttāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasundharām ṣaṣṭiṁ varṣa
sahasrāṇāṁ vi krimiḥ . dāna dānā cchrēyōnupāḷanaṁ dānātsvarggamavāpnōti pāḷanādacyutaṁ padaṁ .
sāmānyōyaṁ bhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrān bhūyōbhūyō yācatē rā
mabhadraḥ . Ī taṁ prayāge tīrttha doḷaṁ kurukṣētradoḷ sāsirakavileyumaṁ sāsirvva
rbrāhmaṇaruma dhanarumanaḷida mahāpātakanakkuṁ . caturmmukha rudrabhaṭṭara kāvyaṁ . padmanābhana baresaṁ cuṁ
kētōjana kaṇḍaraṇe .
Digital edition of SII 18.79 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
